description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from puma. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Length: 22 cm Height: 10.5 cm Made of synthetic high gloss leather with splash print on the outside and a puma brand badge Zippered closure with a branded zip holder Left flap has a coin pouch, transparent pouch and a pocket Right flap has one main chamber for stashing away currency notes, and multiple card slots Care Wipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
